---
title: "Adenomyosis spatial transcriptomics"
subtitle: "Covariate sensitivity analysis"
author: "Emily Johnson"
date: today
date-format: short
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    theme: litera
    toc: true
editor: source
code-block-bg: true
code-block-border-left: "#31BAE9"
---
# Differential expression analysis

## Load libraries

```{r}
#| output: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(NanoStringNCTools)
library(GeomxTools)
library(GeoMxWorkflows)
library(tidyverse)
library(factoextra)
library(reshape2)
library(pheatmap)
library(writexl)
library(ggrepel)
library(edgeR)
library(limma)
library(statmod)
library(variancePartition)
library(GeoDiff)
library(janitor)
library(VennDiagram)
library(cowplot)
library(doParallel)
library(lme4)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(wesanderson)
library(randomcoloR)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
source("src/utilityFunctions.R")
source("src/ArchRpalettes.R") # additional colour palettes
```

## Load the normalised data

```{r}

target_spatial_data_geoDiff <- readRDS("results/GeoDiff_normalised_spatial_data.RDS")

```

# Process data

```{r}

mat <- target_spatial_data_geoDiff@assayData$normmat
mat <- na.omit(mat)

pheno <- pData(target_spatial_data_geoDiff)

```

```{r}

table(pheno$E.M.LSP, pheno$Endometriosis)
table(pheno$E.M.LSP, pheno$Fibroids)

```

## Limma with GeoDiff normalised data method

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: true

design  <- model.matrix( ~ 0 + Annotation + E.M.LSP + Endometriosis + Fibroids, pheno)
colnames(design) <- gsub("Annotation", "", colnames(design))

dupcor <- duplicateCorrelation(mat, design, block=pheno$`Sample ID`)

# This step uses only the genome-wide average for the random effect
fitDupCor <- lmFit(mat, design, block=pheno$`Sample ID`, correlation=dupcor$consensus)


# Create contrasts
contrastTable <- read.delim("data/contrastGroups.txt")
contrasts <- apply(contrastTable, 1, function(x) paste0(x[1], "-", x[2]))
contrasts <- gsub("Annotation", "", contrasts)
contrasts[18] <- "(CD45_Functionalis + CD31_Functionalis + Stroma_Functionalis + PanCK_Functionalis)/4 - (CD45_Basalis + CD31_Basalis + Stroma_Basalis + PanCK_Basalis)/4"


contrast.matrix <- makeContrasts(contrasts = contrasts, 
            levels = colnames((coef(fitDupCor))))
colnames(contrast.matrix)[17] <- "Stroma_Adenomyosis-Stroma_Myometrium"
colnames(contrast.matrix)[18] <- "Functionalis-Basalis"


# Fit model
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fitDupCor, contrast.matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2,trend = TRUE)


sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table <- lapply(seq_along(contrasts), function(x) getResultsDataFrame(fit2, 
            x, contrastTable[x, 2], contrastTable[x, 3]))

names(sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table) <- colnames(contrast.matrix)


# Save results
saveRDS(sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table,file="results/differential_expression/sensitivity_analysis/sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_pairwise_comparisons.RDS")

sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table_short_names <- sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table
names(sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table_short_names) <- str_trunc(names(sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table_short_names), 31, "right")
openxlsx::write.xlsx(sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table_short_names, file = "./results/differential_expression/sensitivity_analysis/sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_pairwise_comparisons.xlsx", rowNames = TRUE)


# Summary of DE expressed genes per comparison 
GeoDiff_res_summary <- data.frame(summary(decideTests(fit2)))
GeoDiff_res_summary <- reshape2::dcast(as.data.frame(GeoDiff_res_summary), Var2 ~ Var1, value.var="Freq")
write.csv(GeoDiff_res_summary, "./results/differential_expression/sensitivity_analysis/sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_res_summary.csv")

summary(decideTests(fit2))
plotSA(fit2, main="Final model: Mean-variance trend (GeoDiff norm)")

```

#### Results summary

```{r}

limma_GeoDiff_norm_DE_res <- DEResPlot(sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table[1:12], foldChangeColumn="logFC", FDRColumn="adj.P.Val", stains=c("CD45|CD31|PanCK|Stroma"))

limma_GeoDiff_norm_DE_res[[1]]

# Save results
ggsave(
  filename = "figures/differential_expression/sensitivity_analysis/sensitivity_analysis_DE_summary.png",
  plot = limma_GeoDiff_norm_DE_res[[1]],
  width = 6,
  height = 7,
  units = c("in"),
  dpi = 300,
  limitsize = TRUE,
  bg = "white"
)


```

#### Volcano plots

```{r}

titles <- gsub('_', ' ',
           gsub('-', ' - ',
           names(sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table)))


volcano_plots <- sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table[1:12] %>% map2(titles[1:12], plotVolcano, top.genes = 5, quadrants = T) %>% plot_grid(plotlist = . ,ncol = 4)


save_plot(plot = volcano_plots, filename = "figures/differential_expression/sensitivity_analysis/sensitivity_analysis_volcano_plots_limma_GeoDiff.png",base_height = 17,base_width = 20.5,bg="white")


volcano_plots <- sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table %>% map2(titles, plotVolcano, top.genes = 5, quadrants = T) 


```


# Correlation with original results

```{r}

limma_GeoDiff_results_table <- readRDS("results/differential_expression/limma_GeoDiff_pairwise_comparisons.RDS")

```

```{r}

titles <- names(limma_GeoDiff_results_table[1:12])

all_res <- list(limma_GeoDiff_results_table[1:12], sensitivity_analysis_limma_GeoDiff_results_table[1:12], titles)


correlation_plots <- pmap(all_res, plotCorrelation, xlab="Original model t-statistics", ylab="Model with extra covariates t-statistics") %>% plot_grid(plotlist = . ,ncol = 3)

save_plot(plot = correlation_plots, filename = "figures/differential_expression/sensitivity_analysis/geodiff_results_correlation.png",base_height = 17,base_width = 16,bg="white")

```
# Secretory subphase analysis

Examine effects of secretory subphase on hormone receptor expression.

```{r}

pheno_full <- pData(target_spatial_data_geoDiff)

# Sample distribution by subphase
subphase_summary <- pheno_full %>%
  group_by(E.M.LSP, region, segment) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(E.M.LSP, region, segment)

cat("Sample distribution by secretory subphase:\n")
cat("Early n=1, Mid n=4, Late n=5\n\n")
print(subphase_summary %>% 
        group_by(E.M.LSP) %>% 
        summarise(Total = sum(n)))

```

```{r}

# Extract hormone receptor expression by subphase
receptor_expr <- mat[hormone_genes, , drop = FALSE] %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample") %>%
  left_join(
    pheno_full %>% rownames_to_column("sample") %>% dplyr::select(sample = "sample", E.M.LSP, region, segment),
    by = "sample"
  )

```

```{r}

# Visualize by subphase and region
receptor_expr_long <- receptor_expr %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(hormone_genes),
               names_to = "Receptor",
               values_to = "Expression")

receptor_subphase_plot <- ggplot(
  receptor_expr_long %>% filter(Receptor %in% c("ESR1", "ESR2", "PGR", "AR")), 
  aes(x = region, y = Expression)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.4, alpha = 0.3, na.rm = TRUE)+
  geom_point(aes(color = E.M.LSP), position = ggplot2::position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.60),
               alpha = 0.5,
               size = 3,
               stroke = 0,
               na.rm = TRUE) + 
  facet_wrap(~Receptor + segment, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
    theme_half_open() +
  background_grid() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Hormone Receptor Expression by Secretory Subphase",
    subtitle = "Early (n=1), Mid (n=4), Late (n=5)",
    x = "Region", 
    y = "Normalised Expression", 
    fill = "Subphase"
  )

print(receptor_subphase_plot)

ggsave(
  filename = "figures/differential_expression/sensitivity_analysis/receptor_expression_by_subphase.pdf",
  plot = receptor_subphase_plot,
  width = 13,
  height = 17.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
:::
